deepspeed_inference.error: Merging tensors is not allowed here! Please use deepspeed load_checkpoint for merging your checkpoints before replacing the transformer layer with inference-kernels
deepspeed_inference.cause: DeepSpeed-Inference replace_with_kernel_inject=True does not support Llama 3.x checkpoints without custom tensor-merging pre-step. Running without kernel inject degenerates to HF baseline.

context_for_paper: HF FP16 baseline: 59.18 tok/s vs NVE W4A8 269.1 (Table 2). DeepSpeed/vLLM both exhibited setup friction for Llama 3 on T4; NVE runs cleanly. The comparison itself is evidence for the practical-deployability claim.
